title: Costs
inferenceLedgerDesc: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.
selectCompany: Select a company to view costs.
pageSubtitle: Inference spend, platform fees, credits, and live quota windows.
selectDateRange: Select a start and end date to load data.
noEvents_period: No cost events in this period.
noBillableEvents: No billable events in this period.
noBudgetPolicies: No budget policies yet. Set agent and project budgets from their detail pages, or use the existing company monthly budget control.
budgetUtilization: {{percent}}% of monthly budget consumed in this range.

byAgent.title: By agent
byAgent.description: What each agent consumed in the selected period.

byProject.title: By project
byProject.description: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.

budget.controlPlaneDesc: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects. Provider subscription quota stays separate and appears under Providers.
budget.activeIncidentsSubtitle: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
budget.pendingApprovalsSubtitle: Budget override approvals awaiting board action
budget.incidentsDesc: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.
budget.agentBudgetsDesc: Recurring monthly spend policies for individual agents.
budget.projectBudgetsDesc: Lifetime spend policies for execution-bound projects.

finance.byBillerDesc: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.

policy.invalidAmount: Enter a valid non-negative dollar amount.
policy.pausedProject: Execution is paused for this project until the budget is raised or the incident is dismissed.
policy.pausedScope: Heartbeats are paused for this scope until the budget is raised or the incident is dismissed.

incident.spentAgainst: Spending reached {{observed}} against a limit of {{limit}}.
incident.pausedProject: Project execution is paused. New work in this project will not start until you resolve the budget incident.
incident.pausedScope: This scope is paused. New heartbeats will not start until you resolve the budget incident.
incident.mustExceedSpend: The new budget must exceed current observed spend.

accounting.title: Accounting model
accounting.subtitle: Paperclip now separates request-level inference usage from account-level finance events. That keeps provider reporting honest when the biller is OpenRouter, Cloudflare, Bedrock, or another intermediary.

inferenceLedger.title: Inference ledger
inferenceLedger.description: Request-scoped usage and billed runs from cost_events.

financeLedger.title: Finance ledger
financeLedger.description: Account-level charges that are not one prompt-response pair.

liveQuotas.title: Live quotas
liveQuotas.description: Provider or biller windows that can stop traffic in real time.

financeSummary.netSubtitle: Debit minus credit for the selected period
financeSummary.estimatedSubtitle: Estimated debits that are not yet invoice-authoritative
